chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 529 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2236/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.7 & 24. 3. For hearing of main case. 03.11.2025 Mr. Taimoor Ahmad Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Muhammad Nayyer Shafique, Collector of Customs East. On the last date following order was passed: “20.10.2025 Mr. Taimoor Ahmad Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for the respondent. Impugned order is prima facie devoid of any independent deliberation or discussion. When confronted, counsel for respondent remains unable to assist. Let respondent No.3, Collector of Customs Appraisement East, Karachi, be present in court on the next date to assist. To come up on 03.11.2025.” Today learned Collector of Customs is present and states that it may be just and proper and in the interest of justice of all parties for the impugned judgment be set aside and the matter be remanded for adjudication afresh in accordance with law, preferably within one month. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this reference application may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Presence and assistance of the officer is appreciated and dispensed with. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969.

Presence and assistance of the officer is appreciated and dispensed with. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
